title: bartlettina chiriquensis
intro: Bartlettina chiriquensis, also known as Chiriqui root, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the tropical forests of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bartlettina chiriquensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Bartlettina chiriquensis is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Central America.
